title: Pillowy Portuguese Tofu Dumplings
description: Indulgent Portuguese dish featuring marinated tofu and dumplings, made with ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients for a unique cultural twist.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cubed tofu to the bowl and toss to coat with the flour mixture.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the tofu until golden brown.
In a separate pot, bring the vegetable broth to a boil and then reduce the heat to low.
Add the sauteed tofu to the pot and simmer for 10 minutes.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the tofu mixture into the pot and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Stir in the portuguese spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
